Text.Name: SYS_LOST
Text.Desc: A lost building that nobody recognizes. \n(Empty)

Text.Name: LunHui_Experiences1
Text.Desc:
This reincarnation has cost all cultivated Laws, but the ultimate move of the Fierce Warrior has not been forgotten. 


Initial Manual: [color=#F2AD35]Wild Punch[/color].

Text.Name: LunHui_Experiences2
Text.Desc:
A strange box, containing numerous people's hopes for a better world. 


Initial Legacy Artifact: [color=#F2AD35]A Beautiful World[/color].

Text.Name: LunHui_Experiences3
Text.Desc:
You are from another world, carrying a strange-looking sword. 


Initial Weapon: [color=#F2AD35]Daraboomba[/color].

Text.Name: LunHui_Experiences4
Text.Desc:
This sword is a token from the leader of the Future Technology Sect. 


Initial Weapon: [color=#F2AD35]Techno Sword[/color].

Text.Name: LunHui_Experiences5
Text.Desc:
A magical manual that can focus Qi within your skull, and increase your Intelligence. As well as... 


Initial Manual: [color=#F2AD35]Awakened Heart[/color].

Text.Name: LunHui_Experiences6
Text.Desc:
A sealed-away memory of the Wanderer marrying his daughter off in another dimension.


Initial Treasure: Sealed-Away Memory: Stardom[/color].

Text.Name: LunHui_Experiences7
Text.Desc:
This person was born lucky, with an ingenious Law imprinted in their mind. 


Unlock Law: [color=#F2AD35]Heaven Stealing Law[/color]
Required Stats: High Constitution.

Text.Name: LunHui_Experiences8
Text.Desc:
This person is a famous swordsman reincarnate, who once struck back and killed the Korean Master of Poison to alleviate a dire situation. 


Initial Weapon: [color=#F2AD35]Banedragon Sword[/color].

Text.Name: LunHui_Experiences9
Text.Desc:
This person has a unique skill that can push their limits to grant super strength in dire situations, at the cost of consuming their lifespan. 


Initial Manual: [color=#F2AD35]Incredible Force[/color].

Text.Name: LunHui_Experiences10
Text.Desc:
This person carries a magical talisman box with three mysterious talismans inside. 


Initial Treasure: [color=#F2AD35]Magical Talisman Box[/color].

Text.Name: LunHui_Experiences11
Text.Desc:
This person carries a magical talisman box with one extremely rare talisman inside. 


Initial Treasure: [color=#F2AD35]Magic Talisman Casket[/color].

Text.Name: LunHui_Experiences12
Text.Desc:
Having strived to attain a cultivated existence their whole life, this person finally finds a manual written by an ancient immortal in the Mt. Kunlun. 


Initial Manual: [color=#F2AD35]Kunlun Immortal's Law[/color].

Text.Name: LunHui_Experiences13
Text.Desc:
This person is the incarnation of the prayers of others, and thus is born with magical powers. 


Initial Manual: [color=#F2AD35]Prayer Talisman[/color]. 
Initial Treasure: [color=#F2AD35]Heart of Prayer[/color].

Text.Name: LunHui_Experiences14
Text.Desc:
This person was a sword immortal of great renown in a past life. As such, they are born with a special artifact. Despite losing its magical power, this artifact is still extraordinary in nature. 


Initial Treasure: [color=#F2AD35]Spike of the He Sect[/color].

Text.Name: LunHui_Experiences15
Text.Desc:
You are the descendent of the Supreme Clarity. After coming of age, your memories came back and naturally inherited the Myriad Artifact Law. 


Unlock Law: [color=#F2AD35]Myriad Artifact Law[/color]
The start of this Law can be difficult. Not recommended for first-time players.

Text.Name: Experiences1
Text.Desc:
You have always wanted to be a disciple under the Sixteen-steps School of Taiyi Sect. After toiling tirelessly, you successfully unlocked the Sixteen Supreme Steps Law, one of the true Laws of the Taiyi Sect. 


Unlock Law: [color=#F2AD35]Sixteen Supreme Steps Law[/color]
Required Stats: High Constitution, Mediocre Charisma, Mediocre Intelligence.

Text.Name: Experiences2
Text.Desc:
You have always wanted to be a disciple under the Plough School of Taiyi Sect. After toiling tirelessly, you successfully unlocked the Grand Chariot Wisdom Law, one of the true Laws of the Taiyi Sect. 


Unlock Law: [color=#F2AD35]Grand Chariot Wisdom Law[/color]
Required Stats: High Perception, Mediocre Constitution, Mediocre Intelligence.

Text.Name: Experiences3
Text.Desc:
You have always wanted to be a disciple under the Reincarnation School of Taiyi Sect. After toiling tirelessly, you successfully unlocked the Six Paths Reincarnation Law, one of the true Laws of the Taiyi Sect. 


Unlock Law: [color=#F2AD35]Six Paths Reincarnation Law[/color]
Required Stats: Mediocre Constitution, High Perception, High Intelligence.

Text.Name: Experiences4
Text.Desc:
You have always wanted to be a disciple under the True Sun School of Taiyi Sect. After tireless efforts, you successfully unlocked the True Sun Refining Law, one of the true Laws of the Taiyi Sect. 


Unlock Law: [color=#F2AD35]True Sun Refining Law[/color]
Required Stats: Mediocre Perception, Mediocre Constitution, Mediocre Charisma, Mediocre Intelligence, Mediocre Luck.

Text.Name: Experiences5
Text.Desc:
You have always wanted to be a disciple under the Sunflower School of Taiyi Sect. After tireless efforts, you successfully unlocked the Sunflower Refining Law, one of the true Laws of the Taiyi Sect. 


Unlock Law: [color=#F2AD35]Sunflower Refining Law[/color]
Required Stats: High Perception, High Charisma, High Intelligence.

Text.Name: Experiences6
Text.Desc:
You only want to gain a foundational understanding of cultivation, and are not particularly interested in a specific Law among the five schools of the Taiyi Sect. You are willing to go with the flow. 


[color=#F2AD35]Five Senses[/color] increased.

Text.Name: Experiences1G1_1
Text.Desc:
You accidentally inherited the Primordial Alchemy Law prior to joining the Taiyi Sect, which leaves you afraid of drawing too much attention as a result. 


Unlock Law: [color=#F2AD35]Primordial Alchemy Law[/color]
The start of this Law can be difficult. Not recommended for first-time players.

Text.Name: Experiences1G1_2
Text.Desc:
You accidentally inherited the Myriad Artifact Law prior to joining the Taiyi Sect, which leaves you afraid of drawing too much attention as a result. 


Unlock Law: [color=#F2AD35]Myriad Artifact Law[/color]
The start of this Law can be difficult. Not recommended for first-time players.

Text.Name: Experiences1G1_3
Text.Desc:
You accidentally inherited the Seven-Slaughtering Sword prior to joining the Taiyi Sect, which leaves you afraid of drawing too much attention as a result. 


Unlock Law: [color=#F2AD35]Seven-Slaughtering Sword[/color]
The start of this Law can be difficult. Not recommended for first-time players.

Text.Name: Experiences1G1_4
Text.Desc:
You accidentally inherited the Heaven Stealing Law before joining the Taiyi Sect, which leaves you afraid of drawing too much attention as a result. 


Unlock Law: [color=#F2AD35]Heaven Stealing Law[/color]
The start of this Law can be difficult. Not recommended for first-time players.

Text.Name: Experiences1G1_5
Text.Desc:
You accidentally inherited the Emotion Severing Law before joining the Taiyi Sect, which leaves you afraid of drawing too much attention as a result. 


Unlock Law: [color=#F2AD35]Emotion Severing Law[/color]
The start of this Law can be difficult. Not recommended for first-time players.

Text.Name: Experiences23
Text.Desc:
On the night of the attack, the artifact room was breached. You couldn't bear to see such rarities get looted, and so you risked your life to save a few. 


Initial Resources added: [color=#F2AD35]Advanced Artifacts[/color].

Text.Name: Experiences24
Text.Desc:
On the night of the attack, the elixir room was breached. You couldn't bear to see such rarities get looted, and so you risked your life to save a few. 


Initial resources added: [color=#F2AD35]Advanced Elixirs[/color].

Text.Name: Experiences25
Text.Desc:
On the night of the attack, the manual room was breached. You couldn't bear to see such rarities get looted, and so you risked your life to save a few. 


Initial resources added: [color=#F2AD35]Advanced Manuals[/color].

Text.Name: Experiences26
Text.Desc:
On the night of the attack, the talisman room was breached. You couldn't bear to see such rarities get looted, and so you risked your life to save a few. 


Initial resources added: [color=#F2AD35]Advanced Talismans[/color].

Text.Name: Experiences31
Text.Desc:
Having joined the Taiyi Sect, you became utterly dedicated to the practice, unwilling to spend time socializing with others. On the night of the attack, nobody was interested in following you, and so you escaped alone. 


Initial [color=#F2AD35]disciples[/color] reduced by 2.

Text.Name: Experiences27
Text.Desc:
Having joined the Taiyi Sect, you paid little mind to networking, as you knew that practicing the basics is of the greatest importance. On the night of the attack, you escaped with just one friend. 


Initial [color=#F2AD35]disciples[/color] reduced by 1.

Text.Name: Experiences29
Text.Desc:
Having joined the Taiyi Sect, you went on to meet many like-minded friends. On the night of the attack, they all escaped alongside you. 


Initial [color=#F2AD35]disciples[/color] increased by 1.

Text.Name: Experiences30
Text.Desc:
Having joined the Taiyi Sect, you spent a lot of time bringing your fellow outer disciples together, and gained a great reputation among them. On the night of the attack, they all escaped alongside you. 


Initial [color=#F2AD35]disciples[/color] increased by 2.

Text.Name: Experiences7
Text.Desc:
You view cultivation as a means by which to gain more pleasure in life. As such, having joined the Taiyi Sect you would often exploit your position as an immortal's disciple to have fun beyond the sect. 


[color=#F2AD35]Charisma [/color]increased. 
[color=#F2AD35]Social [/color]skills increased. 
Initial gears added: [color=#F2AD35]Clothes and Accessories[/color].

Text.Name: Experiences8
Text.Desc:
Having joined the Taiyi Sect, you were trapped within a magic seal for a month while out adventuring. Having felt the agony of extreme hunger in the past, you learned to always bring enough food with you. 


[color=#F2AD35]Constitution [/color]increased. 
Initial [color=#F2AD35]resources of food and drinks[/color] substantially increased. 
Initial resources added: [color=#F2AD35]Fasting Pill[/color].

Text.Name: Experiences9
Text.Desc:
Having joined the Taiyi Sect, you were given the responsiblity of building the sect's outer disciples' areas. Your job required that you carry all kinds of resources with you, and work in different places around the sect. 


[color=#F2AD35]Perception [/color]increased. 
Initial [color=#F2AD35]building resources[/color] substantially increased. 
Initial resources added: [color=#F2AD35]Rare Materials[/color].

Text.Name: Experiences10
Text.Desc:
Having joined the Taiyi Sect, you were made responsible for the security of the Manual Pavilion. You took the opportunity to transcribe and record some of the Novice Manuals for future reference. 


[color=#F2AD35]Intelligence [/color]increased. 
Initial resources added: [color=#F2AD35]Manuals: Collection of Basic Talismans, Introduction to Elixirs[/color].

Text.Name: Experiences11
Text.Desc:
Having joined the Taiyi Sect, you acquired a famous sword while out on an adventure. You kept it with you at all times, hoping to one day craft it into an artifact. As such, you would often ask the senior disciples questions relating to the various methods of artifact mastery. 


[color=#F2AD35]Artifact Mastery [/color]skill increased. 
Initial resources added: [color=#F2AD35]Weapon (Sword)[/color].

Text.Name: Experiences12
Text.Desc:
Having joined the Taiyi Sect, you often borrowed tomes on spells from the Manual Pavilion. Once while perusing such a book, a light emanated from within its pages, and shot deep into your mind. Ever since that day, you have shown a special talent for spells. 


[color=#F2AD35]Spell [/color]skills increased. 
Initial [color=#F2AD35]Spell Power [/color]increased.

Text.Name: Experiences13
Text.Desc:
Having joined the Taiyi Sect, you once ate a strange fruit while out on an adventure. A senior lecturer conducted an examination, and concluded that the fruit actually improved your Qi and Meridians. It resulted in an increase in your Protection Qi. 


[color=#F2AD35]Protection [/color]skills increased. 
Initial [color=#F2AD35]Qi Barrier Power[/color] increased.

Text.Name: Experiences14
Text.Desc:
Having joined the Taiyi Sect, you were assigned to work in the elixir room. You carried all kinds of medicines to aid the senior cultivators in practicing alchemy. 


[color=#F2AD35]Healing [/color]skills increased. 
[color=#F2AD35]Magic Crafting [/color]skills increased. 
Initial [color=#F2AD35]medicinal resources[/color] substantially increased. 
Initial resources added: [color=#F2AD35]Rare Medicine[/color].

Text.Name: Experiences15
Text.Desc:
Having joined the Taiyi Sect, you were assigned to work in the artifact room. You carried all kinds of resources to aid the senior cultivators in crafting artifacts. 


[color=#F2AD35]Crafting [/color]skills increased. 
[color=#F2AD35]Magic Crafting [/color]skills increased. 
Initial [color=#F2AD35]material resources[/color] substantially increased. 
Initial resources added: [color=#F2AD35]Rare Materials[/color].
